blockingIssues.description: Only `session.bodyText` is XML-escaped inside `<context_pack>`; raw key-file and key-command sections are still inserted verbatim, so XML-sensitive filenames or commands can invalidate Claude/Hermes exports.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the current ContextPack service test coverage gap for exact equal-score/equal-timestamp cap-pressure survivor selection in `user-testing.md`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The expected mission artifact set for this review was not present in the snapshot, so the worker handoff/transcript procedure could not be audited directly.
rejectedObservations.reason: environmental / out-of-repo concern; not actionable as a repo guidance update
